function: Consolidate the week: recycle, no new grammar.
canDo: I can ask if someone has something and say what I don't have.

grammarPoint.title: Week 3 recap: у меня есть / нет + genitive
grammarPoint.explanation: No new grammar today. Recap: **У меня́ есть X** keeps X in the nominative. **У меня́ нет X** and **мно́го/ма́ло/ско́лько X** all put X in the **genitive**: masc. **-а/-я**, neut. **-о/-е → -а/-я**, fem. **-а/-я → -ы/-и**. And **мой/моя́/моё** matches gender, not the noun's ending — «мой па́па» is still masculine.

examples.ru: У меня́ есть семья́, но ма́ло вре́мени.
examples.en: I have a family, but little time.
How much time do you have?

examples.ru: Мой брат и моя́ сестра́ живу́т здесь.
examples.en: My brother and my sister live here.

examples.ru: У нас нет са́хара, но есть хлеб.
examples.en: We don't have sugar, but we have bread.

dialogues.title: A full conversation
dialogues.note: Every word here is from this week or before. Read once, then shadow it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you have a big family?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Да! Мой брат, моя сестра, и родители.
lines.en: Yes! My brother, my sister, and (my) parents.

lines.speaker: A
lines.ru: Здорово. У тебя много времени сегодня?
lines.en: Great. Do you have a lot of time today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sometimes not much, but today a lot!

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Да, есть. И сыр, и молоко. Достаточно!
lines.en: Yes, we do. And cheese, and milk. Enough!

comprehension.q: Who is in speaker B's family?
Does speaker B usually have a lot of time with family?
Say you have a big family.
Say you don't have much time today.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word from this week.
Translate into Russian — mix words from the whole week.

items.q: How much time do you have?
We have bread and cheese, enough.
items.answer: У нас есть хлеб и сыр, достаточно.

exercises.prompt: Put the words in the right order.

translate.en: I have a family, but little time.
translate.answer: У меня есть семья, но мало времени.

translate.en: My sister has money, but I don't.
translate.answer: У сестры есть деньги, а у меня нет.

translate.en: How much bread do you have?
A big family, a lot of work.

buildSentences.instruction: Write 5 sentences mixing family words, есть/нет, and much/little/how much.

freeWrite.prompt: Write your fullest paragraph yet: your family, what you have and don't have, and how much time/money you have today.
freeWrite.modelAnswer: У меня большая семья: мама, папа, брат и сестра. У меня есть телефон и велосипед, но нет машины. Сегодня много работы, но у меня достаточно времени. У меня мало денег, но у меня есть семья. Это хорошо.

tasks: Describe your family and one thing you have or don't have, to a real person.
Ask someone «Сколько у тебя...?» about something real.
mission.verification: Did the description hold together, start to finish? Note yes / no.

srsCards.front: How much time do you have?
